title: 1. Lower Test Coverage Threshold
description: 15 failures on test adequacy, ratio requirements of 0.25 consistently unmet
suggested_change: Reduce test coverage requirement from 0.25 to 0.15 ratio temporarily
impact: Could convert 15 failed builds to published (15% improvement)

evidence.description: 15 failures on test adequacy, ratio requirements of 0.25 consistently unmet

title: 2. Increase Max Deferrals Limit
description: 33% of failures hit max deferrals, suggesting near-misses
suggested_change: Increase deferral limit from current to +50%
impact: Could recover 20+ builds hitting deferral limits

evidence.description: 33% of failures hit max deferrals, suggesting near-misses

title: 3. Enhance Test Generation Framework
description: Systematic test generation failures across personas
suggested_change: Add explicit test generation methodology to engineering personas

evidence.description: Systematic test generation failures across personas

title: 4. Add Specification Compliance Checklist
description: Consistent under-delivery of specified file counts
suggested_change: Mandatory specification verification step before completion

evidence.description: Consistent under-delivery of specified file counts

title: 5. Skill Deprecation and Consolidation
description: 0% utilization across 28 skills
suggested_change: Archive 20+ unused skills, consolidate to 5-8 core workflows

evidence.description: 0% utilization across 28 skills

title: 6. Add Build Success Monitoring
description: Need visibility into what drives the 3% success rate
suggested_change: Add build outcome analysis to Sky-Lynx responsibilities

evidence.description: Need visibility into what drives the 3% success rate

title: 7. Adjust Quality Score Thresholds
description: Published average (52.0) suggests successful projects still score poorly
suggested_change: Lower quality gates from current to 45-50 range
